message:
Implement PyFloat and PyUnicode objects

PYOBJECT IMPLEMENTATIONS - PART 1 ✅

Files Created (2):
==================

1. pyobject_float.zig (319 lines)
   - PyFloatObject struct (simple f64 wrapper)
   - PyFloat_Type type object
   - Number protocol (add, sub, mul, div, pow, etc.)

   Functions (12):
   - PyFloat_FromDouble, AsDouble
   - PyFloat_Check, CheckExact
   - PyFloat_GetInfo, GetMax, GetMin
   - PyFloat_FromString

   Number methods:
   - Add, subtract, multiply, divide
   - Remainder, divmod, power
   - Negative, positive, absolute
   - Bool, int, float conversions

2. pyobject_unicode.zig (392 lines)
   - PyUnicodeObject struct (UTF-8 storage)
   - PyUnicode_Type type object
   - Sequence protocol for strings

   Functions (20):
   - PyUnicode_FromString, FromStringAndSize, FromFormat
   - PyUnicode_AsUTF8, AsUTF8AndSize, AsUTF8String
   - PyUnicode_GetLength
   - PyUnicode_Check, CheckExact
   - PyUnicode_DecodeUTF8, Concat, Join
   - PyUnicode_Format, Compare, Find, Count
   - PyUnicode_Replace, Split, Substring

What Works:
===========

Float operations:
- Create floats from double
- Arithmetic (+, -, *, /, %, **)
- Comparisons and conversions
- Hash function

String operations:
- Create from C string / UTF-8 buffer
- Get UTF-8 data
- Concatenation
- Character counting (UTF-8 aware)
- Hashing (djb2 algorithm)

Simplified for "make it work":
================================

Float:
- Simple f64 wrapper (no special values handling yet)
- Basic arithmetic (no overflow checks)

Unicode:
- UTF-8 storage only (no UTF-16/UTF-32)
- Simplified character counting
- String operations stubbed (find, replace, split)
- No format string support yet

Next: Agent 2 implementing PyLong + PyBytes
Then: Integrate all 4 types together! 🚀
